TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-hunting_kaniw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: sumamad u nikauzip haw nu Sakizaya cay kauyza a dada haw canacanan haw ku nika pilungucan.
S.PHON: sumamad u nikauzip ħaw nu sakizaja ʦaj kaujza a dada ħaw ʦanaʦanan ħaw ku nika pir~ɾuŋuʦan.
S.FORM: sumamad u nikauzip haw nu Sakizaya cay kauyza a dada haw canacanan haw ku nika pilungucan.
S.PHON: sumamad u nikauzip ħaw nu sakizaja ʦaj kaujza a dada ħaw ʦanaʦanan ħaw ku nika pir~ɾuŋuʦan.
S.TRANSL: 從前撒奇萊雅的生活不會要求很多事.

TRANSL.notes: (Sakizaya people) did not ask for many things in the past.

S.TRANSL: did not ask for many things in the past.

S.FORM: saka cay kauyza u malukay mauzipay i tini i niyazu' saka kanca atu pangcah kuyni u Sakizaya nanay nanu babalaki a kawaw kuyni.
S.PHON: saka ʦaj kaujza u mar~ɾukaj mauzipaj i tini i nijazuʔ~ʡ saka kanʦa atu paŋʦaħ kujni u sakizaja nanaj nanu babar~ɾaki a kawaw kujni.
S.FORM: saka cay kauyza u malukay mauzipay i tini i niyazu' saka kanca atu pangcah kuyni u Sakizaya nanay nanu babalaki a kawaw kuyni.
S.PHON: saka ʦaj kaujza u mar~ɾukaj mauzipaj i tini i nijazuʔ~ʡ saka kanʦa atu paŋʦaħ kujni u sakizaja nanaj nanu babar~ɾaki a kawaw kujni.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅人在部落跟阿美族一起生活,從前就這樣.
It was in this way that Sakizaya people lived with Amis in a tribe.

S.FORM: u kakanen haw nuyni u Sakizaya hananay a tamdaw u niadupan u nibutingan tuni paluma tu canacanan.
S.PHON: u kakanən ħaw nujni u sakizaja ħananaj a tamdaw u niadupan u nibutiŋan tuni par~ɾuma tu ʦanaʦanan.
S.FORM: u kakanen haw nuyni u Sakizaya hananay a tamdaw u niadupan u nibutingan tuni paluma tu canacanan.
S.PHON: u kakanən ħaw nujni u sakizaja ħananaj a tamdaw u niadupan u nibutiŋan tuni par~ɾuma tu ʦanaʦanan.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅族人的食物是打獵來的,捕魚來的,還有種很多東西.

TRANSL.notes: Sakizaya people's food came from hunting and fishing, and (they) grew up many things.

S.TRANSL: Sakizaya people's food came from hunting and fishing, and grew up many things.

S.FORM: saka kakaidihan nu babalaki uyni sa u nu tabuyu'ay miadupan.
S.PHON: saka kakaidiħan nu babar~ɾaki ujni sa u nu tabujuʔ~ʡaj miadupan.
S.FORM: saka kakaidihan nu babalaki uyni sa u nu tabuyu'ay miadupan.
S.PHON: saka kakaidiħan nu babar~ɾaki ujni sa u nu tabujuʔ~ʡaj miadupan.
S.TRANSL: 老人家最想要的去山上打獵.
What the senior citizens wanted most was going to the mountain and hunting.

S.FORM: cay ka u aadupen.
S.PHON: ʦaj ka u aadupən.
S.FORM: cay ka u aadupen.
S.PHON: ʦaj ka u aadupən.

TRANSL.notes: 不是只有獵捕(動物).

S.TRANSL: 不是只有獵捕 .

TRANSL.notes: (They) did not simply hunt.

S.TRANSL: did not simply hunt.

S.FORM: Sakizaya sa uyni tu pabuy.
S.PHON: sakizaja sa ujni tu pabuj.
S.FORM: Sakizaya sa uyni tu pabuy.
S.PHON: sakizaja sa ujni tu pabuj.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅人獵捕豬隻.
Sakizaya people hunt pigs.

S.FORM: mibihkac anu uyni tu u mabahelay.
S.PHON: mibiħkaʦ anu ujni tu u mabaħər~ɾaj.
S.FORM: mibihkac anu uyni tu u mabahelay.
S.PHON: mibiħkaʦ anu ujni tu u mabaħər~ɾaj.
S.TRANSL: 會射會飛的東西.

TRANSL.notes: (They) would shoot anything that would fly.

S.TRANSL: would shoot anything that would fly.

S.FORM: saka pana'en.
S.PHON: saka panaʔ~ʡən.
S.FORM: saka pana'en.
S.PHON: saka panaʔ~ʡən.
S.TRANSL: 於是就被打到.

TRANSL.notes: Then (it) would be shot.

S.TRANSL: Then would be shot.

S.FORM: anu uyni tu muculilay i tini i sasa amin tu canacanan saka uyza mamin u kelin haw u sapibihkac.
S.PHON: anu ujni tu muʦur~ɾir~ɾaj i tini i sasa amin tu ʦanaʦanan saka ujza mamin u kər~ɾin ħaw u sapibiħkaʦ.
S.FORM: anu uyni tu muculilay i tini i sasa amin tu canacanan saka uyza mamin u kelin haw u sapibihkac.
S.PHON: anu ujni tu muʦur~ɾir~ɾaj i tini i sasa amin tu ʦanaʦanan saka ujza mamin u kər~ɾin ħaw u sapibiħkaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 用捕獸器與弓箭射在地上走的所有動物.

TRANSL.notes: (They) used traps and arrows to shoot all (animals) which walked on the ground.

S.TRANSL: used traps and arrows to shoot all which walked on the ground.

S.FORM: tatenga' anu tayza henay i buyu' kanca yadah haw kuyni kunuyan tu belac anu u silaw tu canacanantu.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ anu tajza ħənaj i bujuʔ~ʡ kanʦa jadaħ ħaw kujni kunujan tu bər~ɾaʦ anu u sir~ɾaw tu ʦanaʦanantu.
S.FORM: tatenga' anu tayza henay i buyu' kanca yadah haw kuyni kunuyan tu belac anu u silaw tu canacanantu.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ anu tajza ħənaj i bujuʔ~ʡ kanʦa jadaħ ħaw kujni kunujan tu bər~ɾaʦ anu u sir~ɾaw tu ʦanaʦanantu.
S.TRANSL: 只要去山上就會揹著很多米、醃豬肉還有其他的.

TRANSL.notes: Whenever (they) went to the mountain, (they) would carry rice, pickled pork and others.

S.TRANSL: Whenever went to the mountain, would carry rice, pickled pork and others.

S.FORM: tya amisadabek i buyu'.
S.PHON: tja amisadabək i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: tya amisadabek i buyu'.
S.PHON: tja amisadabək i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 在山上蓋工寮.

TRANSL.notes: (They) built up lodgings in the mountains.

S.TRANSL: built up lodgings in the mountains.

S.FORM: tya alahican a matenes.
S.PHON: tja ar~ɾaħiʦan a matənəs.
S.FORM: tya alahican a matenes.
S.PHON: tja ar~ɾaħiʦan a matənəs.
S.TRANSL: 有時會待很久.

TRANSL.notes: Sometimes (they) would stay for a long time.

S.TRANSL: Sometimes would stay for a long time.

S.FORM: cacay a lipay ku piadup i tini i buyu'.
S.PHON: ʦaʦaj a r~ɾipaj ku piadup i tini i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: cacay a lipay ku piadup i tini i buyu'.
S.PHON: ʦaʦaj a r~ɾipaj ku piadup i tini i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 在山上打獵一星期.

TRANSL.notes: (They) stayed in the mountain for one week.

S.TRANSL: stayed in the mountain for one week.

S.FORM: saka anu maala ku nu pabuy tabakiay kanca i tinitu i buyu' mipacuk.
S.PHON: saka anu maar~ɾa ku nu pabuj tabakiaj kanʦa i tinitu i bujuʔ~ʡ mipaʦuk.
S.FORM: saka anu maala ku nu pabuy tabakiay kanca i tinitu i buyu' mipacuk.
S.PHON: saka anu maar~ɾa ku nu pabuj tabakiaj kanʦa i tinitu i bujuʔ~ʡ mipaʦuk.
S.TRANSL: 如果抓到大隻豬,一定在山上就殺好了.

TRANSL.notes: If (they) caught a big pig, (they) definitely killed (it).

S.TRANSL: If caught a big pig, definitely killed .

S.FORM: anu huwad han pataluma' sa mabadad kuyni u zazan ku niyazu' aca.
S.PHON: anu ħuwad ħan patar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ sa mabadad kujni u zazan ku nijazuʔ~ʡ aʦa.
S.FORM: anu huwad han pataluma' sa mabadad kuyni u zazan ku niyazu' aca.
S.PHON: anu ħuwad ħan patar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ sa mabadad kujni u zazan ku nijazuʔ~ʡ aʦa.
S.TRANSL: 如果抬回家,路途遙遠.

TRANSL.notes: If (they) carried it home, it was too far.

S.TRANSL: If carried it home, it was too far.

S.FORM: a cay kakapah.
S.PHON: a ʦaj kakapaħ.
S.FORM: a cay kakapah.
S.PHON: a ʦaj kakapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 這樣不好.
It was not good.

S.FORM: sa cay kayadah sa kuyni u baluzu' saka.
S.PHON: sa ʦaj kajadaħ sa kujni u bar~ɾuzuʔ~ʡ saka.
S.FORM: sa cay kayadah sa kuyni u baluzu' saka.
S.PHON: sa ʦaj kajadaħ sa kujni u bar~ɾuzuʔ~ʡ saka.
S.TRANSL: 心想獵物也不多.

TRANSL.notes: (They) thought that there were not many animals.

S.TRANSL: thought that there were not many animals.

S.FORM: i tinitu i buyu' miidid ididen ma min haw ku niadupan tya taluma' satu haw sa.
S.PHON: i tinitu i bujuʔ~ʡ miidid ididən ma min ħaw ku niadupan tja tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ satu ħaw sa.
S.FORM: i tinitu i buyu' miidid ididen ma min haw ku niadupan tya taluma' satu haw sa.
S.PHON: i tinitu i bujuʔ~ʡ miidid ididən ma min ħaw ku niadupan tja tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ satu ħaw sa.
S.TRANSL: 把獵物都烤了才回家.

TRANSL.notes: (They) roasted the animals and then went home.

S.TRANSL: roasted the animals and then went home.

S.FORM: tu haw u bangsisay amin haw ku pataluma'ay.
S.PHON: tu ħaw u baŋsisaj amin ħaw ku patar~ɾumaʔ~ʡaj.
S.FORM: tu haw u bangsisay amin haw ku pataluma'ay.
S.PHON: tu ħaw u baŋsisaj amin ħaw ku patar~ɾumaʔ~ʡaj.
S.TRANSL: 拿回家的都很香.

TRANSL.notes: What (they) brought home smelled good.

S.TRANSL: What brought home smelled good.

S.FORM: saka mahiza haw ku nikauzip babalaki.
S.PHON: saka maħiza ħaw ku nikauzip babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: saka mahiza haw ku nikauzip babalaki.
S.PHON: saka maħiza ħaw ku nikauzip babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 老人家的生活就是這樣.
The senior citizens' lives were in that way.

S.FORM: saka wawa satu haw saka cay kapicudad kuyni u wawa i tawya.
S.PHON: saka wawa satu ħaw saka ʦaj kapiʦudad kujni u wawa i tawja.
S.FORM: saka wawa satu haw saka cay kapicudad kuyni u wawa i tawya.
S.PHON: saka wawa satu ħaw saka ʦaj kapiʦudad kujni u wawa i tawja.
S.TRANSL: 那時候小孩子都不讀書.
The children at that time did not study.

S.FORM: cay kahiza yu mahini ku nikapicudad a ma masasudemedemec.
S.PHON: ʦaj kaħiza ju maħini ku nikapiʦudad a ma masasudəmədəməʦ.
S.FORM: cay kahiza yu mahini ku nikapicudad a ma masasudemedemec.
S.PHON: ʦaj kaħiza ju maħini ku nikapiʦudad a ma masasudəmədəməʦ.
S.TRANSL: 不像現在要讀書,互相競爭.

TRANSL.notes: Unlike nowadays, (children) will study and compete.

S.TRANSL: Unlike nowadays, will study and compete.

S.FORM: saka ca'ay sapicudad saka.
S.PHON: saka ʦaʔ~ʡaj sapiʦudad saka.
S.FORM: saka ca'ay sapicudad saka.
S.PHON: saka ʦaʔ~ʡaj sapiʦudad saka.
S.TRANSL: 所以不讀書.

TRANSL.notes: (They) did not study.

S.TRANSL: did not study.

S.FORM: kina cacay tayni i buyu' mikilul tuynian u babalaki.
S.PHON: kina ʦaʦaj tajni i bujuʔ~ʡ mikir~ɾur~ɾ tujnian u babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: kina cacay tayni i buyu' mikilul tuynian u babalaki.
S.PHON: kina ʦaʦaj tajni i bujuʔ~ʡ mikir~ɾur~ɾ tujnian u babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 跟著老人家去山上一次.

TRANSL.notes: (They) would follow the senior citizens to go to the mountain.

S.TRANSL: would follow the senior citizens to go to the mountain.

S.FORM: saka limulakay isaw ku nikaubaluzu' i tini i buyu'.
S.PHON: saka r~ɾimur~ɾakaj isaw ku nikaubar~ɾuzuʔ~ʡ i tini i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: saka limulakay isaw ku nikaubaluzu' i tini i buyu'.
S.PHON: saka r~ɾimur~ɾakaj isaw ku nikaubar~ɾuzuʔ~ʡ i tini i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 在山上心裡很高興.

TRANSL.notes: (They) were happy in the mountain.

S.TRANSL: were happy in the mountain.

S.FORM: haw amikilul tu babalaki a minanam haw a hicaen ku nipiwait tuyni u iduc hican a mibihkac hican ku pipana'.
S.PHON: ħaw amikir~ɾur~ɾ tu babar~ɾaki a minanam ħaw a ħiʦaən ku nipiwait tujni u iduʦ ħiʦan a mibiħkaʦ ħiʦan ku pipanaʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: haw amikilul tu babalaki a minanam haw a hicaen ku nipiwait tuyni u iduc hican a mibihkac hican ku pipana'.
S.PHON: ħaw amikir~ɾur~ɾ tu babar~ɾaki a minanam ħaw a ħiʦaən ku nipiwait tujni u iduʦ ħiʦan a mibiħkaʦ ħiʦan ku pipanaʔ~ʡ.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩)跟著老人家練習如何丟、如何射箭、如何打彈弓.

S.TRANSL: 跟著老人家練習如何丟、如何射箭、如何打彈弓.

TRANSL.notes: (Children) followed the senior citizens to practice how to throw, shoot and play slingshot.

S.TRANSL: followed the senior citizens to practice how to throw, shoot and play slingshot.

S.FORM: mimelaw kuyni u wawa haw tuyni u babalaki.
S.PHON: mimər~ɾaw kujni u wawa ħaw tujni u babar~ɾaki.
S.FORM: mimelaw kuyni u wawa haw tuyni u babalaki.
S.PHON: mimər~ɾaw kujni u wawa ħaw tujni u babar~ɾaki.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子會一直看著老人家.
Children would be watching the senior citizens.

S.FORM: kabalakiantu caytu pakaculil kuheni sa.
S.PHON: kabar~ɾakiantu ʦajtu pakaʦur~ɾir~ɾ kuħəni sa.
S.FORM: kabalakiantu caytu pakaculil kuheni sa.
S.PHON: kabar~ɾakiantu ʦajtu pakaʦur~ɾir~ɾ kuħəni sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們老了走不動.
They were old and could not walk.

S.FORM: uyni tu u wawa ku mamikuday.
S.PHON: ujni tu u wawa ku mamikudaj.
S.FORM: uyni tu u wawa ku mamikuday.
S.PHON: ujni tu u wawa ku mamikudaj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子替代他們.
The children substituted for them.

S.FORM: anu balakitu saka mahizaay ku nika piadup sananay.
S.PHON: anu bar~ɾakitu saka maħizaaj ku nika piadup sananaj.
S.FORM: anu balakitu saka mahizaay ku nika piadup sananay.
S.PHON: anu bar~ɾakitu saka maħizaaj ku nika piadup sananaj.

TRANSL.notes: 等(他們)長大之後才會打獵.

S.TRANSL: 等 長大之後才會打獵.

TRANSL.notes: (They) would hunt after they grew up.

S.TRANSL: would hunt after they grew up.

S.FORM: cay kau mita tada Sakizaya anu uyni tu u Amis anu uyni tu u canacanan a a binacadan a tamdaw tabuyu' ma min.
S.PHON: ʦaj kau mita tada sakizaja anu ujni tu u amis anu ujni tu u ʦanaʦanan a a binaʦadan a tamdaw tabujuʔ~ʡ ma min.
S.FORM: cay kau mita tada Sakizaya anu uyni tu u Amis anu uyni tu u canacanan a a binacadan a tamdaw tabuyu' ma min.
S.PHON: ʦaj kau mita tada sakizaja anu ujni tu u amis anu ujni tu u ʦanaʦanan a a binaʦadan a tamdaw tabujuʔ~ʡ ma min.
S.TRANSL: 不是只有我們撒奇萊雅人,還有阿美族人以及其他的原住民都會到山上.
Not only Sakizaya people but also Amis and other indigenous people would go to the mountain.

S.FORM: nawhani mamin nima ku aadupen i tini i buyu'.
S.PHON: nawħani mamin nima ku aadupən i tini i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: nawhani mamin nima ku aadupen i tini i buyu'.
S.PHON: nawħani mamin nima ku aadupən i tini i bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 山上有很多獵物.
There were many prey in the mountain.

S.FORM: nanika u zuma tu ku nikauzip nu mita i mahini saka.
S.PHON: nanika u zuma tu ku nikauzip nu mita i maħini saka.
S.FORM: nanika u zuma tu ku nikauzip nu mita i mahini saka.
S.PHON: nanika u zuma tu ku nikauzip nu mita i maħini saka.
S.TRANSL: 現在我們的生活已經改變了.
Now our lives have changed.

S.FORM: caytu papiadup.
S.PHON: ʦajtu papiadup.
S.FORM: caytu papiadup.
S.PHON: ʦajtu papiadup.
S.TRANSL: 不可以打獵.

TRANSL.notes: (We) could not hunt.

S.TRANSL: could not hunt.

S.FORM: mahizaay saka tatenga' yadahtu ku nika niadupan niididan saka taluma'tu.
S.PHON: maħizaaj saka tatəŋaʔ~ʡ jadaħtu ku nika niadupan niididan saka tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡtu.
S.FORM: mahizaay saka tatenga' yadahtu ku nika niadupan niididan saka taluma'tu.
S.PHON: maħizaaj saka tatəŋaʔ~ʡ jadaħtu ku nika niadupan niididan saka tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡtu.
S.TRANSL: 打到的獵物很多,也烤完了,要帶回家了.

TRANSL.notes: (They) hunt many animals, roasted and took home.

S.TRANSL: hunt many animals, roasted and took home.

S.FORM: malikeluntu haw nai buyu'.
S.PHON: mar~ɾikər~ɾuntu ħaw nai bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: malikeluntu haw nai buyu'.
S.PHON: mar~ɾikər~ɾuntu ħaw nai bujuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 從山上下來.

TRANSL.notes: (They) came down from the mountain.

S.TRANSL: came down from the mountain.

S.FORM: a taluma' sa kanca mudadiw i tini i zazan taba ki mamin kuyni u dadiw.
S.PHON: a tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ sa kanʦa mudadiw i tini i zazan taba ki mamin kujni u dadiw.
S.FORM: a taluma' sa kanca mudadiw i tini i zazan taba ki mamin kuyni u dadiw.
S.PHON: a tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ sa kanʦa mudadiw i tini i zazan taba ki mamin kujni u dadiw.
S.TRANSL: 在回家的路上一定會大聲唱歌.

TRANSL.notes: On the way home, (they) would sing aloud.

S.TRANSL: On the way home, would sing aloud.

S.FORM: babalaki mudadiw.
S.PHON: babar~ɾaki mudadiw.
S.FORM: babalaki mudadiw.
S.PHON: babar~ɾaki mudadiw.
S.TRANSL: 老人也唱.
The senior citizens sang songs.

S.FORM: saka makatengil ku i tiniay i niyazu'ay a luma'.
S.PHON: saka makatəŋir~ɾ ku i tiniaj i nijazuʔ~ʡaj a r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: saka makatengil ku i tiniay i niyazu'ay a luma'.
S.PHON: saka makatəŋir~ɾ ku i tiniaj i nijazuʔ~ʡaj a r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 所以,要讓部落的人家聽到.
So, the people in this tribe could hear it.

S.FORM: a izawtu haw ku miadupay taluma'tu.
S.PHON: a izawtu ħaw ku miadupaj tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡtu.
S.FORM: a izawtu haw ku miadupay taluma'tu.
S.PHON: a izawtu ħaw ku miadupaj tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡtu.
S.TRANSL: 打獵的人回來了.
The hunters came back.

S.FORM: cay kuheni saka tada ca haw ka limulak nu balucu' a maduba' a milikeluh.
S.PHON: ʦaj kuħəni saka tada ʦa ħaw ka r~ɾimur~ɾak nu bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ a madubaʔ~ʡ a mir~ɾikər~ɾuħ.
S.FORM: cay kuheni saka tada ca haw ka limulak nu balucu' a maduba' a milikeluh.
S.PHON: ʦaj kuħəni saka tada ʦa ħaw ka r~ɾimur~ɾak nu bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ a madubaʔ~ʡ a mir~ɾikər~ɾuħ.
S.TRANSL: 心裡太高興了,用跑的去迎接他們.

TRANSL.notes: (They) were very happy so that they ran to welcome (the hunters).

S.TRANSL: were very happy so that they ran to welcome .

S.FORM: haw makatukuh i tini i zazan malitemuh saka.
S.PHON: ħaw makatukuħ i tini i zazan mar~ɾitəmuħ saka.
S.FORM: haw makatukuh i tini i zazan malitemuh saka.
S.PHON: ħaw makatukuħ i tini i zazan mar~ɾitəmuħ saka.
S.TRANSL: 在路上相遇.

TRANSL.notes: (They) met on he road.

S.TRANSL: met on he road.

S.FORM: kudayentu nuheni a mimuku a midimata' kuyni u niadupan nuheni saka.
S.PHON: kudajəntu nuħəni a mimuku a midimataʔ~ʡ kujni u niadupan nuħəni saka.
S.FORM: kudayentu nuheni a mimuku a midimata' kuyni u niadupan nuheni saka.
S.PHON: kudajəntu nuħəni a mimuku a midimataʔ~ʡ kujni u niadupan nuħəni saka.
S.TRANSL: 就幫他們扛及挑獵物.

TRANSL.notes: (They) carried and picked up the prey for them.

S.TRANSL: carried and picked up the prey for them.

S.FORM: mahizaay haw kuyni u Sakizaya i tawya henay.
S.PHON: maħizaaj ħaw kujni u sakizaja i tawja ħənaj.
S.FORM: mahizaay haw kuyni u Sakizaya i tawya henay.
S.PHON: maħizaaj ħaw kujni u sakizaja i tawja ħənaj.
S.TRANSL: 在以前撒奇萊雅人就是這樣.
In the past, Sakisaya did this.

S.FORM: tatenga' makatukuh i luma' u ca'ay piadup a lalumaan sipabadis mamin sipatulaka mamin.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ makatukuħ i r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ u ʦaʔ~ʡaj piadup a r~ɾar~ɾumaan sipabadis mamin sipatur~ɾaka mamin.
S.FORM: tatenga' makatukuh i luma' u ca'ay piadup a lalumaan sipabadis mamin sipatulaka mamin.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ makatukuħ i r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ u ʦaʔ~ʡaj piadup a r~ɾar~ɾumaan sipabadis mamin sipatur~ɾaka mamin.
S.TRANSL: 到家以後,沒有打獵的親戚也分給他們一份.

TRANSL.notes: When (the hunters) went home, they gave parts of the prey to the relatives who did not hunt.

S.TRANSL: When went home, they gave parts of the prey to the relatives who did not hunt.

S.FORM: saka limulak satu haw tuyni u labi u pina nu demiad haw a mukan haw tu niadupan?
S.PHON: saka r~ɾimur~ɾak satu ħaw tujni u r~ɾabi u pina nu dəmiad ħaw a mukan ħaw tu niadupan?
S.FORM: saka limulak satu haw tuyni u labi u pina nu demiad haw a mukan haw tu niadupan?
S.PHON: saka r~ɾimur~ɾak satu ħaw tujni u r~ɾabi u pina nu dəmiad ħaw a mukan ħaw tu niadupan?
S.TRANSL: 要多少天去吃完獵物?
How many day would it take to eat all the prey?

S.FORM: saka uyni haw u sakaka ay haw a kalimuklan kanamuhan.
S.PHON: saka ujni ħaw u sakaka aj ħaw a kar~ɾimukr~ɾan kanamuħan.
S.FORM: saka uyni haw u sakaka ay haw a kalimuklan kanamuhan.
S.PHON: saka ujni ħaw u sakaka aj ħaw a kar~ɾimukr~ɾan kanamuħan.
S.TRANSL: 那是最高興的事.
That was the happiest thing.

S.FORM: haw nu Sakizaya a kakawaw kuyni u mahizaay ku nu miadupay sananay a kawaw.
S.PHON: ħaw nu sakizaja a kakawaw kujni u maħizaaj ku nu miadupaj sananaj a kawaw.
S.FORM: haw nu Sakizaya a kakawaw kuyni u mahizaay ku nu miadupay sananay a kawaw.
S.PHON: ħaw nu sakizaja a kakawaw kujni u maħizaaj ku nu miadupaj sananaj a kawaw.
S.TRANSL: 這是撒奇萊雅打獵的事情.
This is the Sakizaya hunting.

S.FORM: hatini ku kamu nu maku.
S.PHON: ħatini ku kamu nu maku.
S.FORM: hatini ku kamu nu maku.
S.PHON: ħatini ku kamu nu maku.
S.TRANSL: 這就是我要說的.
This is what I would say.
